stories.title: The Golden Knights' four-point plan for Game 5 suc...
stories.summary: Coming off the first two-goal loss in the series, how does Vegas get back on track?

stories.title: Lightning strikes twice: Kucherov wins 2nd MVP
stories.summary: Lightning star Nikita Kucherov won the Hart Trophy as the NHL's MVP for the second time, finishing 10 points ahead of Connor McDavid in the closest vote since 2001-02.

stories.title: Mexico opens WC with win after record 3 red cards
stories.summary: Co-hosts Mexico got off to a victorious start, beating South Africa 2-0 as the largest World Cup in history kicked off Thursday at Mexico City's famed Estadio Azteca.

stories.title: Ruggs denied parole nearly five years after crash
stories.summary: Ex-NFL player Henry Ruggs was denied parole nearly five years after killing a woman in a car crash in Las Vegas, the Nevada Board of Parole Commissioners ruled Thursday.

stories.title: Coker, Panthers reach 3-year, $35M extension
stories.summary: The Panthers extended a key part of their offense Thursday, reaching a three-year, $35 million deal with receiver Jalen Coker, agent Matt Glose told NFL Network's Ian Rapoport.
